caption: A woman with blonde-tipped dreadlocks, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt, is seated in a recording studio. She is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand and is looking off-camera to her left with a focused expression. To her left, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, with smaller text above it reading "Employee Only". Behind her is a white wall with a vertical yellow stripe. To her right, on-screen text reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white, with a smaller logo beneath it. Another logo featuring the word "PODCAST" is visible on the left side of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, maintaining her gaze and posture as she listens or prepares to speak, with virtually no visible change in her expression or the environment between the frames.
